name: prompt-manager
title: Prompt Manager
description: Save, organize, and instantly reuse your AI prompts with lightning-fast access inside Raycast.

commands.name: save-prompt
commands.title: Save Prompt
commands.description: Quickly save a prompt with title, tags, and template variables for future use across AI tools.
commands.subtitle: Store a new prompt for quick reuse

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: altobellidardo
